product.name: Bathroom Light Fixtures Over Mirror,3-Light Brushed Nickel Wall Sconce Vanity Lights with Milk White Frosted Glass Shades for Bathroom,Vanity Lighting Fixtures for Bath
features: [The Design You Like] 3-light bathroom vanity light with brushed nickel finish and milk white frosted glass shades.Modern design add fashion sense to your bathroom.We wish it would not only be a bathroom vanity light but also an art decoration.

[The Durable Material You Need] We adopot brushed nickel finish,brushed nickel bathroom vanity light is not only antirust but also antidust.We use durable socket that can resist the high temperature and prevent melting.Milky Glass Shades provide soft and eye-protection light.Importantly enough,we adopt the more durable and longer lifespan glass,our team consider the safety of our customers.

[Which Bulbs is Suitable] This nickel light fixture bathroom support any E26 base bulb (MAX 60W each bulb).Such as LED/CFL/Halogen bulb or other any E26 base bulb. Our nickel vanity light is also designed to be dimmable when used with a dimmable bulb.(Bulbs are not included).
[Easy to Install] Nickel bathroom vanity light with clear guidance and mounting hardwire is suitable for connection to a 110V-120V, easy to replace blubs with the open design.
[Where to install it is up to you] Light up your bathroom.Decoration for your mirror.This wall lamp is what you want.
